inputs.label: Annual Property Tax
inputs.businessContext: The total property tax for the full year as assessed by the local government.

inputs.label: Days in Tax Year
inputs.businessContext: The number of days in the tax year (typically 365, or 366 for a leap year).

inputs.label: Days Owned
inputs.businessContext: Number of days the property was owned during the tax year.

inputs.label: Other Fees
inputs.businessContext: Any additional fees or adjustments (e.g., closing costs, penalties, credits).
